Report 1**\n- **Purpose:** Correctly identifies the code's intent—loading 'BlueSwarm' native module.\n- **Analysis & Conclusion:** States the code is straightforward and benign; risk depends on the native module implementation.\n- **Scores:** malware 0, securityRisk 0.2, confidence 0.7.\n- **Assessment:** **Accurate.** No issues found in the code itself.
